tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"nft list table inet filter >/dev/null 2>&1 || nft add table inet filter && nft 'list chain inet filter output' >/dev/null 2>&1 || nft 'add chain inet filter output { type filter hook output priority 0; }' && nft 'add rule inet filter output ip protocol icmp icmp type echo-request limit rate 100/second burst 20 packets counter accept' || true && nft 'add rule inet filter output ip protocol icmp icmp type echo-request counter drop' || true && nft list ruleset"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"enable
configure terminal
policy-map POLICE-ICMP
 class ICMP-FROM-WKPTXS
  no police
  police 128000 16000
  conform-action transmit
  exceed-action drop
 exit
exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/0
 service-policy input POLICE-ICMP
 exit
ip access-list extended ICMP-CPU
 permit icmp any any
 exit
class-map match-any CO_PP_ICMP
 match access-group name ICMP-CPU
 exit
policy-map CONTROL-PLANE-POLICY
 class CO_PP_ICMP
  police 64000 8000
  conform-action transmit
  exceed-action drop
 exit
exit
control-plane
 service-policy input CONTROL-PLANE-POLICY
exit
end
write memory
show policy-map interface GigabitEthernet0/0
show policy-map CONTROL-PLANE-POLICY
show running-config | section control-plane
"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
enable
Switch#configure terminal
Enter configuration commands, one per line.  End with CNTL/Z.
Switch(config)#policy-map POLICE-ICMP
Switch(config-pmap)# class ICMP-FROM-WKPTXS
Switch(config-pmap-c)#  no police
% Incomplete command.

Switch(config-pmap-c)#  police 128000 16000
Switch(config-pmap-c-police)#  conform-action transmit
Switch(config-pmap-c-police)#  exceed-action drop
Switch(config-pmap-c-police)# exit
Switch(config-pmap-c)#exit
Switch(config-pmap)#interface GigabitEthernet0/0
Switch(config-if)# service-policy input POLICE-ICMP
Switch(config-if)# exit
Switch(config)#ip access-list extended ICMP-CPU
Switch(config-ext-nacl)# permit icmp any any
Switch(config-ext-nacl)# exit
Switch(config)#class-map match-any CO_PP_ICMP
Switch(config-cmap)# match access-group name ICMP-CPU
Switch(config-cmap)# exit
Switch(config)#policy-map CONTROL-PLANE-POLICY
Switch(config-pmap)# class CO_PP_ICMP
Switch(config-pmap-c)#  police 64000 8000
Switch(config-pmap-c-police)#  conform-action transmit
Switch(config-pmap-c-police)#  exceed-action drop
Switch(config-pmap-c-police)# exit
Switch(config-pmap-c)#exit
Switch(config-pmap)#control-plane
Switch(config-cp)# service-policy input CONTROL-PLANE-POLICY
Switch(config-cp)#exit
Switch(config)#end
Switch#write memory
